summary:
Vasopressin antagonists primarily target the medullary collecting duct where V2 receptors are densely expressed and regulate aquaporin-2 channel activity critical for water reabsorption. This makes the medullary collecting duct the principal site of their therapeutic effect.  

\boxed{D}
